excerpt: Which dermal fella is best for nasolabial folds so once again this is based on my experience not too much on data because there's very little specific data but FDA approved products include Juvederm Ultra 3 and many of the other brand names you'll know of as well have an intermed…

segments.text: which dermal fella is best for nasolabial folds so once again this is based on my experience not too much on data because there's very little specific data but FDA approved products include Juvederm Ultra 3 and many of the other brand names you'll know of as well have an intermediate depth dermal Phillip which I would use confidently in this area Juvederm vole lift is another product I use a lot I also use Juvederm voluma all those not specifically recommended I find it works very well I've never had a complication in that area and using any of the dermal products don't fit our products in fact now and I feel confident using up 2.3 million each nasolabial fold what I'd be a little bit reticent about is using to thinner products because then you're placing products and not getting as much support as you need and of course and thicker products might also cause an over projection or just placing too much product or a sense of annoyance for the patient be able to feel a firm hard lump

in that area if you've treated it the lower down you get and the more likely I'd use a intermediate depth product rather than a thicker product that's emulating bone and because of the same reasons for the middle a B or fold which is you don't want the patient built to feel that thickness in that area and to be annoyed by it so intermediate depth devil fellows would be my first join my first choice [Music]

transcript: which dermal fella is best for nasolabial folds so once again this is based on my experience not too much on data because there's very little specific data but FDA approved products include Juvederm Ultra 3 and many of the other brand names you'll know of as well have an intermediate depth dermal Phillip which I would use confidently in this area Juvederm vole lift is another product I use a lot I also use Juvederm voluma all those not specifically recommended I find it works very well I've never had a complication in that area and using any of the dermal products don't fit our products in fact now and I feel confident using up 2.3 million each nasolabial fold what I'd be a little bit reticent about is using to thinner products because then you're placing products and not getting as much support as you need and of course and thicker products might also cause an over projection or just placing too much product or a sense of annoyance for the patient be able to feel a firm hard lump in that area if you've treated it the lower down you get and the more likely I'd use a intermediate depth product rather than a thicker product that's emulating bone and because of the same reasons for the middle a B or fold which is you don't want the patient built to feel that thickness in that area and to be annoyed by it so intermediate depth devil fellows would be my first join my first choice [Music]
